children.name: div
children.textContent: Jordan confirmed annual budget of $48K. Legal team needs to review DPA before signing. Target start date Q2. Team size 120 users.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Sent formal proposal with annual billing terms, SLA guarantees (99.9% uptime), and 3-month onboarding package included.

children.name: div
children.textContent: CFO (Rachel Wong) joined unexpectedly. Expressed preference for monthly billing to align with current vendor cycle. Conflicts with annual terms already discussed.

children.name: div
children.textContent: CFO prefers monthly billing — DRIFT detected

children.name: div
children.textContent: Jordan flagged security team requirement for a penetration test report before contract can be signed. Not mentioned in original scope or any prior conversations.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Pen test report required — NEW requirement

children.name: div
children.textContent: Cold intro via LinkedIn mutual. Jordan expressed interest in replacing legacy CRM with modern SaaS solution. Mentioned team frustration with current tooling.
